description: Store a single context entry with structured metadata. Scopes are auto-created if they do not exist. Use 'supersedes' to replace an existing entry by marking the old one inactive. Returns the new entry ID and content hash.

confidence.description: Confidence level. Affects recall priority ordering: high entries surface before low entries at the same scope level.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. After this time the entry is considered stale. Stored but not enforced by the storage layer.

kind.description: Entry classification. Determines recall priority. fact: verified information. decision: architectural choice with rationale. preference: user/project preference. lesson: learned from experience. reference: pointer to external material. feedback: user correction (highest priority). pattern: recurring code/process pattern. observation: general-purpose note.

priority.description: Numeric priority for manual ordering. Higher values surface first in recall results.

scope.description: Singular write scope. Send a JSON object {kind, ...} where kind is one of: 'path' (with 'path'), 'cwd_inferred' (optional 'cwd'), 'project' (with 'project'), 'repo' (with 'project', 'repo'), 'session' (with 'project', 'session', optional 'repo'). See the schema's examples field. Scope chains are created on demand. Default: global.

cwd.description: Filesystem path used for scope inference. Optional for kind 'cwd_inferred'.

path.description: Canonical scope path beginning with 'global'. Required for kind 'path'; required for kind 'subtree' on broad shapes.

project.description: Project identifier. Required for kind 'project', 'repo', and 'session'.

repo.description: Repo identifier. Required for kind 'repo'. Optional for kind 'session'.

source.description: Source URL or file path for reference entries.

supersedes.description: ID of an existing entry that this new entry replaces. The old entry is marked inactive and linked via a 'supersedes' relation.

tags.description: Freeform tags for categorization and filtering. Pass a JSON array: ["tag1", "tag2"].

title.description: Short summary of the entry. Displayed in search results and browse listings.

name: cx_store

outputSchema.description: Store receipt: created entry id, resolved scope path, entry kind, content hash, and scope creation status.

scope_created.description: True when this write created at least one missing scope in the chain.

superseded_id.description: Entry id superseded by this write, or null when absent.
